title: Retro Croatian Poppy Seed Tart
description: A nostalgic Croatian dessert with a crumbly crust and jammy poppy seed filling, seasoned with rose water and citrus zest.
instructions: Combine flour, salt, melted clarified butter, and ice water to form a dough.
Soak poppy seeds in 100ml hot water for 15 minutes, then drain.
Grind the soaked seeds and mix with sugar, rose water, dried orange peel, and lemon zest until smooth.
Fold plum jam into the seed mixture until evenly incorporated.
Spread the filling onto the chilled dough and shape the tart in a greased kazan cauldron.
Bake for 35 minutes until golden and the jam is bubbly.
Let the tart cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Optional: whisk egg white until frothy, brush over the tart, and bake for an additional 5 minutes for a glossy finish.
